description_of_loss: On 08/01/2026, a water leak originating from property owned or managed by Coastal Trucking Inc. at 8200 Lehigh Avenue, Morton Grove, IL 60053 caused extensive damage to our insured's property located at 221 Industrial Park Drive, Lakeland, FL 33805. The leak, which appears to have resulted from a faulty washing machine hose, went undetected for approximately two days, allowing water to infiltrate our insured's basement and first floor.
